treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Drug eluting stent placement of the SVG to the RPDA

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted for chest pain and symptoms
Clopidogrel 75 mg daily started to prevent blood clots
Ondansetron, Lorazepam, Prochlorperazine, and Maalox/Lidocaine administered for nausea and vomiting

patient_outcome.complications: Nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain during admission
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Need to continue clopidogrel and aspirin to prevent blood clots and heart attack
